title: Nekomas Fixed
description: Adds many ideas from Nekomas videos
body:
Over the past few months, Nekoma has been diving into different parts of Minecraft that he always felt were a bit underwhelming, trying to improve them through new ideas, features, and fixes. Whether it was through giving forgotten items a purpose, reworking old mechanics, or bringing back fan favorite concepts from past mob and biome folds, the goal has always been the same. Keep that vanilla feel while showing how much more the game could be.

Some of the features included so far include the:
- Clam: Generates in warm oceans, can turn sand into pearls or holds your own items
- Ocean Illager Patrols: Comes with new and bigger boats via a boat upgrade template
- Nautilus block: Hold you pets and animals in safety and also helps transporting them
- Turtle Armour: Rather than just the helmet, each having its own unique ability
- Melon block: Eat the block like a cake, while also making your own vertical slabs
- Underwater Torch: To light up under the sea, turns off when not in water

A basic [Wiki](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1YEvdkF8kW8D0TxB1e0qDHPBcVBOochRyjK4skUokZlg/edit?usp=sharing) of all the changes

Based of the videos from Nekomas Youtube Channel such as [Features Minecraft DESPERATELY needs](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-5EVjgQy1WM)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/-5EVjgQy1WM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


This Mod requires:
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

Other mods you might like to use:
- [Green_Jab's Fixed Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/fixed)
- [Ectoluminescence](https://modrinth.com/mod/ectoluminescence)

If have you never played modded minecraft before, go to the [Fabric Homepage](https://fabricmc.net/) and download the downloader. Run it for the version of your choice, then in your minecraft folder (you can find by pressing open world folder ingame) there should be a mod folder. In it place the .jar file for this mod along with chosen version of the required mods listed above. Launch the game with fabric version selected. Now go create a new world. If you wish to make a server, this is needed on both server and client.
